name: threat-model
description: Evidence-backed threat modeling and patch remediation for codebases.

interface.shortDescription: Threat model a codebase, then patch the findings it surfaces.
interface.longDescription: Bundles the threat-model and threat-patch skills into a single local plugin for security review and remediation workflows.
defaultPrompt: Threat model this codebase and write findings.json.
Review the latest diff for new attack surfaces.
Patch the open findings from findings.json.
